headline: Three S&P 500 Value ETFs Beating Some Growth Rivals in 2026 and Most Investors Are Still Looking the Other Way
summary: The value-over-growth rotation that strategists had been calling for since the start of the year is finally showing up in fund returns. Through mid-May, large-cap value indexes are running ahead of several large-cap growth peers for the first sustained stretch in years, and the three cleanest vehicles for capturing it are Vanguard S&P 500 Value ... headline: AI Data Centers Are About to Break the Grid. One Company Just Spent $67 Billion to Fix It

headline: How ExxonMobil’s Governance Clash With ISS and Fraud-Case Shift Will Impact Exxon Mobil (XOM) Investors
summary: On May 15, 2026, ExxonMobil criticized ISS’s recommendation against its Texas redomiciliation proposal, arguing ISS used flawed analysis, misstated shareholder protections, and failed to disclose a conflict of interest linked to ongoing litigation. ExxonMobil’s pushback highlights how corporate governance structures, legal forums, and retail voting programs can materially influence shareholder rights and long-term corporate oversight.
